info.name: Workday Payroll Input API
One-Time Payments
Workday Payroll List One-time Payments

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: workerId
params.description: Filter by worker identifier

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by status

items.docs: Retrieve all one-time payment requests, optionally filtered by status, worker, or date range.

info.name: Workday Payroll Create a One-time Payment

items.docs: Submit a new one-time payment request for a worker, such as a bonus, retroactive pay adjustment, or relocation allowance.

info.name: Workday Payroll Get a One-time Payment

params.name: paymentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the one-time payment

items.docs: Retrieve details of a specific one-time payment request.

info.name: Workday Payroll Update a One-time Payment

params.name: paymentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the one-time payment

items.docs: Update a pending one-time payment request.

info.name: Workday Payroll Delete a One-time Payment

params.name: paymentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the one-time payment

items.docs: Delete a pending one-time payment request that has not yet been processed.

info.name: Payroll Adjustments
Workday Payroll List Payroll Adjustments

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: workerId
params.description: Filter by worker identifier

params.name: adjustmentType
params.description: Filter by adjustment type

items.docs: Retrieve all payroll adjustment records, optionally filtered by worker, type, or status.

info.name: Workday Payroll Create a Payroll Adjustment

items.docs: Submit a payroll adjustment to correct, reverse, or reclassify previously processed payroll data.

info.name: Workday Payroll Get a Payroll Adjustment

params.name: adjustmentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the payroll adjustment

items.docs: Retrieve details of a specific payroll adjustment.

info.name: Supplemental Earnings
Workday Payroll List Supplemental Earnings

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: workerId
params.description: Filter by worker identifier

items.docs: Retrieve all supplemental earning submissions, such as bonuses, commissions, and other non-regular earnings.

info.name: Workday Payroll Create a Supplemental Earning

items.docs: Submit a supplemental earning for a worker to be included in the next payroll run.

info.name: Workday Payroll Get a Supplemental Earning

params.name: earningId
params.description: Unique identifier for the supplemental earning

items.docs: Retrieve details of a specific supplemental earning submission.

info.name: Workday Payroll Delete a Supplemental Earning

params.name: earningId
params.description: Unique identifier for the supplemental earning

items.docs: Delete a pending supplemental earning that has not yet been processed.

info.name: Input Batches
Workday Payroll List Input Batches

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by batch status

items.docs: Retrieve all payroll input batch submissions, including their processing status and validation results.

info.name: Workday Payroll Create an Input Batch

items.docs: Submit a batch of payroll input records for processing, supporting earnings, deductions, and time-off entries in bulk.

info.name: Workday Payroll Get an Input Batch

params.name: batchId
params.description: Unique identifier for the input batch

items.docs: Retrieve details and status of a specific input batch submission.

info.name: Time Off Inputs
Workday Payroll List Worker Time Off Inputs

params.name: workerId
params.description: Unique identifier for the worker

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve time off input records for a specific worker that affect payroll calculations.

info.name: Workday Payroll Create a Time Off Input

params.name: workerId
params.description: Unique identifier for the worker

items.docs: Submit a time off input for a worker to be reflected in payroll processing.
